<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\Attributes; use Attribute; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ #[Attribute(Attribute::TARGET_CLASS | Attribute::TARGET_METHOD)] final readonly class TestDox { /** * @var non-empty-string */ private string $text; /** * @param non-empty-string $text */ public function __construct(string $text) { $this->text = $text; } /** * @return non-empty-string */ public function text(): string { return $this->text; } }
